hypothesis: If the o4-mini model is prompted with one-shot prompting using the most complex in-context example to extract synthesis procedures from scientific papers into PROV-DM graphs, then it will achieve higher collection rate and higher precision, recall, and F1 at both the structural (nodes/edges) and parametric (node attributes) levels on a test set of 25 papers (37 procedures) than GPT-4.1 mini and GPT-4.1 under zero-shot or less complex prompting configurations.
